name: Weather Pro
description: Hybrid weather module: AI plugin (current weather + 7-day forecast via Open-Meteo) + sidebar/Control Room widget with live data and daily forecast cards.

commands.get_current_weather: Get current weather for a city or user's location.
commands.get_weather_forecast: Get 7-day daily weather forecast for a city.

function.name: WEATHER_PRO__get_current_weather
function.description: Get the current weather conditions for a specific city. If city is omitted, uses the user's profile city or IP geolocation.

city.description: City name, e.g. 'Rome' or 'London'. Leave empty to auto-detect.

function.name: WEATHER_PRO__get_weather_forecast
function.description: Get a 7-day daily weather forecast (min/max temp, conditions, precipitation probability) for a city.

city.description: City name. Leave empty to use user's default location.

slash_commands.description: Show current weather (optionally for a city: /weather Rome)
Show 7-day forecast (optionally for a city: /forecast Milan)
